title: dortmanna roughii
side_effects: Dortmanna roughii can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, gastrointestinal issues, and respiratory problems. Ingesting the plant's toxic compounds can lead to symptoms like nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, potentially resulting in dehydration and electrolyte imbalance. Prolonged exposure to the plant's volatile oils may also cause headaches, dizziness, and confusion, while skin contact can lead to irritation, redness, and burns. Misuse of Dortmanna roughii can exacerbate underlying medical conditions, such as asthma or cardiovascular disease, and may interact with prescription medications.
